instructions.instruction: Identify and remove AI-writing tells (uniform sentence rhythm, listicle everything, hollow hedging)
Add a point of view: react to facts, do not just report them
instructions.relevant_when: Text reads as neutral and voiceless

instructions.instruction: Vary sentence rhythm and let some structural mess in
instructions.relevant_when: Every sentence has the same cadence

instructions.instruction: Cut clichés and filler ('it is important to note', 'in today's world')
instructions.relevant_when: Text is padded with empty phrases
